_comment: Ground truth for repair.pdf, established by visual inspection of rendered candidate regions during Phase 1b calibration (see evals/calibrate_oracle.py + runs/calibration/). One complete figure per page; the two drawings-only shaded text boxes (p6 MORPHOLOGY, p8 RAPID REVIEW) are correctly rejected. Tests assert INSPECTED reality, not assumptions.
